compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: AeroZesh T4, AeroZesh T6, AeroZesh G6, AeroZesh G8
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: AI VPD-driven speed control, grow recipes, predictive schedule, auto-mode
compatible_devices.notes: X42 listed alongside AeroZesh as compatible on VIVOSUN German core-devices page; full spec sheet not yet published (EU pre-order, deliveries Sept 2026); inferred from SGS ecosystem pattern

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: AeroLight A100SE, AeroLight AW200SE, AeroLight AW400SE
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: AI spectrum and dimming management, VPD-integrated light scheduling, grow recipes, GrowCam feedback loop
compatible_devices.notes: X42 announced with wireless device sync across VIVOSUN SGS ecosystem; AeroLight listed as SGS core device; full spec sheet pending release

compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: VIVOSUN power adapter (required when no AeroLight/AeroZesh present to power controller)
compatible_devices.notes: LumaLight listed as GrowHub-compatible on VIVOSUN German site; RJ11 connection confirmed; power adapter needed if no SGS device powers controller; X42 compatibility inferred from SGS ecosystem pattern—confirm on product release

Mars Hydro TS/FC/FC-E/SP series confirmed compatible with GrowHub E42A+ via RJ11; X42 compatibility inferred as likely successor—verify on X42 spec sheet release; some models may have limited daisy-chain or dimming range
Spider Farmer G/SE/SF series confirmed compatible with GrowHub E42A+ via RJ11; X42 compatibility inferred—confirm on product release; daisy-chain limits may apply
ViparSpectra KS5000/XS2000/PRO (2023 models) confirmed with GrowHub E42A+ via RJ11; X42 compatibility inferred; earlier ViparSpectra models may not be compatible

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Cloudline T4, Cloudline T6, Cloudline S6, Cloudline A6
compatible_devices.notes: AC Infinity Cloudline A/B/S/T (Type-C connector versions) confirmed with GrowHub E42A+; Molex-connector variants require adapter on E42A+; X42 compatibility inferred as likely—confirm on release; controlled via VIVOSUN app not AC Infinity app

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: AI-driven airflow management, 10-speed, natural wind mode, VPD-linked schedule
compatible_devices.notes: AeroWave E listed as SGS core device on VIVOSUN German core-devices page alongside X42; full spec not published; wireless device sync implies AeroWave E integration

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: AI plant monitoring via GrowCam, CO2/VPD/temp/RH tracking, predictive grow intelligence
compatible_devices.notes: VIVOSUN 4-in-1 sensor (CO2+temp+RH+light) confirmed compatible with GrowHub E42A+ and inferred for X42; X42 additionally integrates AI GrowCam for thermal imaging and plant health feedback; full X42 sensor spec pending release
